title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI development tools to accelerate software delivery, completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster and projecting 40% more capabilities by 2026. High-adoption teams are deploying daily with AI assistance.
